data.title: Trump Tariffs Are Pressuring Bitcoin, Bonds, Commodities, VanEck Warns
data.description: Portfolio managers at global asset manager VanEck say the Trump administration's sweeping new tariff regime is exerting widespread pressure across asset classes, with tangible impacts already visible in digital assets, commodities, emerging markets and fixed income.

data.title: TeraWulf Price Forecast Cut As Analyst Cites Tough Bitcoin Economics, Doubts Over AI Growth Plans
data.description: Rosenblatt analyst maintains Buy on TeraWulf with lowered price target; company well-positioned in Bitcoin mining and HPC, but underperforms peers due to execution and AI concerns.

data.title: AMD Powers Google Cloud's New AI Servers Promising 80% Boost In Speed
data.description: AMD announced new C4D and H4D VMs powered by 5th-gen EPYC processors for high-performance computing. Stock down due to China tariffs and competition with Nvidia.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Scraps Recession Call After Trump's Surprise Tariff Pause As Wall Street Marks Strongest Day Since 2008
TQQQ Surges Over 35% In Tech-Led Rebound Following Trump's Tariff Pause
data.description: The ProShares UltraPro QQQ soared over 35% Wednesday afternoon, riding the coattails of a broad tech-driven rally sparked by President Donald Trump's 90-day tariff pause for non-retaliating nations.
